call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently filled out a form online regarding a Personal Loan. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  That's right, 8.99%.  Now, what were you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: Just some home improvements, you know, a new kitchen countertop. 
Agent: Excellent! A kitchen upgrade is a fantastic investment.  Now, with this loan, you'd have fixed monthly payments over, say, a five-year term.  We can adjust that, of course.  The total cost, including interest, would be… let me just calculate… around $19,800. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, that's a little more than I expected. 
Agent: I understand. We can look at a longer term to lower the monthly payment, but that would increase the total interest paid. Or, we could slightly reduce the loan amount.  We also have options for automatic payments, which can sometimes qualify you for a small discount. 
Eleanor: Okay, let's stick with the $10,000. What's the monthly payment? 
Agent: The monthly payment would be approximately $186.  We can send over the full loan agreement for your review.  It details everything, including the terms and conditions.  Are you happy to proceed with that? 
Eleanor: Yes, that sounds good. 
Agent: Wonderful! I'll get that emailed over to you right away.  Thank you for your time, Eleanor!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're pre-approving customers for a $2500 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm on a fixed income! 
Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… 
Robert: (Hangs up abruptly)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. Your name was given to us by our partner, GreenTech Solutions. 
Jessica: Oh, right. I was talking to them about financing for some equipment. 
Agent: Exactly! We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%.  Now, what kind of equipment are you looking at? 
Jessica: It's for my photography business. A new camera and some lighting. 
Agent: Fantastic! Investing in your business is smart. So, with this loan, you'd have a fixed monthly payment. We can do terms from one to seven years. Let's say five years… that would be around $300 a month.  Now, there is an origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $150.  And there's a late payment fee of $25 if a payment is more than 15 days overdue.  We also offer optional credit insurance, which would cover your payments if you were to become unable to work. That's an additional 0.5% per month. 
Jessica: Hmm, the origination fee is okay, but I'm not sure about the credit insurance. What happens if I pay it off early? 
Agent: Great question! There's no penalty for early repayment. You can pay it off at any time without incurring any extra charges.  We want to make this as flexible as possible for you.  We also have a rewards program where you earn points for every dollar you borrow. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds good. Can you send me a detailed breakdown of all the fees and the repayment schedule? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll email that over to you right now. It will include everything we discussed, plus a link to the full loan agreement.  Do you have any other questions for me at this point? 
Jessica: No, I think that's all for now. Thanks!

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa calling from Prime Financial. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I was just browsing. 
Agent: Great! We're offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card with a 17.99% interest rate. It comes with rewards points on every purchase and travel insurance. 
Michael: 17.99%? That's pretty high, isn't it? I think I'll pass. I've got a couple of cards already. 
Agent: I understand. We do have other options with lower rates, but they require excellent credit.  Perhaps we could explore those? 
Michael: No, I'm good. Thanks anyway. 
Agent: Okay, no problem. If you change your mind, feel free to visit our website. Have a good day!

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin from Liberty Loans. We're offering a Personal Loan… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! And where did you even *get* my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're pre-approving customers for a $3000 Personal Loan at 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! That's a rip-off! I'm not falling for that. I want my number removed from your list! 
Agent: I understand your frustration, ma'am. I can… 
Patricia: No, you don't understand! I'm on a fixed income! Just take me off your list! (Hangs up)
